subject: An Archer job-class figure from Final Fantasy Tactics Advance — a female-presenting humanoid with long flowing silver-white hair wearing an orange headband, drawing a bow
suspected_ip: Archer job class (Final Fantasy Tactics Advance)
description: A female-presenting figure dominates the frame in a dynamic action pose, pulling back a bowstring with both hands. She has extremely long silver-white hair that streams dramatically behind and around her, creating strong diagonal motion lines. She wears an orange headband, a light chest piece leaving her shoulders bare, and brown bracers or arm guards. The bow is clearly visible — a dark, recurve-style weapon. Small yellow and blue cross or clover shapes float around the figure, adding a playful, magical quality. The background is dark grey-green with an abstract, textured quality and scattered paint-splatter marks. The art style is bold and anime-influenced consistent with the FFTA aesthetic (Ryoma Ito character design). The figure's expression is focused and determined.
foreground: Female archer drawing a bow, silver hair streaming dramatically, surrounded by floating colored shapes
background: Dark grey-green textured field with paint-splatter marks and scattered cross shapes
emotion: focused and determined — brow set, body fully committed to the draw
